    Index

    A B C D E F G H I J L M N O P R S T U V W Y 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    G

    Game - Class in it.polimi.Game.Core
    Main model class representing the state of a Mesos game session.
    Game() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Constructs a new Game instance with default initial values.
    GameController - Class in it.polimi.Game.Core
    Coordinates incoming commands from the network layer and translates them into operations on the Game model.
    GameController(Game) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Game.Core.GameController
    Constructs a new GameController bounded to a specific game instance.
    GameController(Game, GameResultRepository) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Game.Core.GameController
    Constructs a new GameController bounded to a specific game instance.
    GameResult - Class in it.polimi.Game.Persistence
    Immutable representation of a finished match result.
    GameResult(String, Instant, String, List) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.GameResult
    Constructs a new GameResult holding the final scores and reports of a match.
    GameResultRepositories - Class in it.polimi.Game.Persistence
    Factory for creating GameResultRepository instances from JSON defaults (db_config.json) and optional environment/system properties overrides.
    GameResultRepository - Interface in it.polimi.Game.Persistence
    Persists final match results.
    GameRoom - Class in it.polimi.Network.Server
    Represents a single game room managing a distinct match, its controller, and connected players.
    GameRoom(int, String, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Server.GameRoom
    Constructs a new GameRoom.
    GameRoom(int, String, String, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Server.GameRoom
    Constructs a new GameRoom.
    GameServiceRemote - Interface in it.polimi.Network.RMI
    RMI contract exposed by the server for Mesos clients.
    GameView - Interface in it.polimi.Game.Core
    Common interface for all Mesos game views (VirtualView, TUI, GUI).
    Gatherer - Class in it.polimi.Characters
    Represents a Gatherer character in the game.
    Gatherer(Era, int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Characters.Gatherer
    Constructs a Gatherer character with the specified properties.
    GATHERER - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.CharacterType
    Specialized in resource discounts.
    getAdminPasswordFromJSON() - Static method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.DbSettings
    Retrieves the database admin password from the configuration file.
    getAdminUserFromJSON() - Static method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.DbSettings
    Retrieves the database admin username from the configuration file.
    getAssetId() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Card
    Returns the GUI asset identifier, or -1 if not assigned.
    getAssetId() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Client.CardNode
     
    getAutoCreateFromJSON() - Static method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.DbSettings
    Checks if automatic table creation is enabled in the configuration file.
    getBuildings() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.CardLoader.BuildingsData
    Returns the loaded buildings.
    getBuildings() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Returns the player's collected building cards.
    getCardImage(int) - Static method in class it.polimi.Network.Client.ImageLoader
    Gets a card image from the cache or loads it from disk.
    getCharacters() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.CardLoader.CharactersData
    Returns the loaded characters.
    getCharacters() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Returns the player's collected character cards.
    getColor() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Returns the player's color.
    getConnectTimeoutMsFromJSON() - Static method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.DbSettings
    Retrieves the connection timeout in milliseconds from the configuration file.
    getContent() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Common.SerializedUpdate
    Gets the textual content or payload of the update.
    getController() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.GameRoom
    Gets the game controller for this room.
    getCost() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Building
    Returns the construction cost of the building.
    getCreatorNickname() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.GameRoom
    Gets the nickname of the room creator.
    getCurrentEra() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Returns the current era of the game.
    getDbNameFromJSON() - Static method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.DbSettings
    Retrieves the database name from the configuration file.
    getDiscount() - Method in class it.polimi.Characters.Builder
    Returns the resource discount granted by this Builder for constructing buildings.
    getDiscount() - Method in class it.polimi.Characters.Gatherer
    Returns the resource discount granted by this Gatherer.
    getEra() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Card
    Returns the era associated with this card.
    getEvents() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.CardLoader.EventsData
    Returns the loaded events.
    getFood() - Method in class it.polimi.Events.Hunting
    Returns the food reward multiplier per Hunter.
    getFood() - Method in class it.polimi.Events.Sustenance
    Returns the food cost multiplier per character.
    getFood() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Returns the player's current food amount.
    getFoodBonus() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.OfferTile
    Returns the food bonus granted by this tile.
    getFoodDelta() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.CardLoader.TurnOrderTrackRule
    Returns the change in food resources.
    getGame() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.GameController
    Gets the game model instance currently handled by this controller.
    getGameModel() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.GameRoom
    Gets the game model for this room.
    getHostFromJSON() - Static method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.DbSettings
    Retrieves the database host from the configuration file.
    getHostFromJSON() - Static method in class it.polimi.Network.Config.NetworkSettings
    Retrieves the default host address from the JSON configuration.
    getIcon() - Method in class it.polimi.Characters.Inventor
    Retrieves the invention icon associated with this character.
    getLastActivity() - Method in interface it.polimi.Network.Server.ClientConnection
    Gets the timestamp (millis) of the last activity from this client.
    getLastActivity() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.ClientHandler
    Gets the system time of the last activity from this client.
    getLastActivity() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiClientConnection
    Returns the timestamp of the last activity registered on this connection.
    getLetter() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.OfferTile
    Returns the identifying letter of the tile.
    getLowerBuildings() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Returns the buildings currently visible in the lower row.
    getLowerRow() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Returns the cards currently visible in the lower row.
    getMaxPlayers() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Common.ActionMessage
    Gets the requested number of players for room creation.
    getMaxPlayers() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.RMI.RmiLoginRequest
     
    getMaxPoints() - Method in class it.polimi.Events.ShamanicRitual
    Returns the points granted to the player with the highest star count.
    getMaxStar() - Method in class it.polimi.Buildings.Ritual.RitualData
    Calculates the maximum star count among all players tracked in this ritual.
    getMessage() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.RMI.RmiLoginResponse
     
    getMinPlayers() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.OfferTile
    Returns the minimum number of players required to use this tile.
    getMinPoints() - Method in class it.polimi.Events.ShamanicRitual
    Returns the points granted to the player with the lowest star count.
    getMinStar() - Method in class it.polimi.Buildings.Ritual.RitualData
    Calculates the minimum star count among all players tracked in this ritual.
    getNickname() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Gets the player's nickname.
    getNickname() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Common.ActionMessage
    Gets the nickname of the player who sent the action.
    getNickname() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.RMI.RmiLoginRequest
     
    getNumLowerCards() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.OfferTile
    Returns the number of cards that must be selected from the lower row.
    getNumUpperCards() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.OfferTile
    Returns the number of cards that must be selected from the upper row.
    getOfferTile() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Returns the offer tile currently assigned to the player.
    getOfferTiles() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.CardLoader.OfferTilesData
    Returns the loaded offer tiles.
    getOfferTiles() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Returns the offer tiles currently available to players.
    getPasswordFromJSON() - Static method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.DbSettings
    Retrieves the database password from the configuration file.
    getPin() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Retrieves the secret PIN for this player.
    getPin() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Common.ActionMessage
    Gets the PIN associated with this message.
    getPin() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.RMI.RmiLoginRequest
     
    getPlayers() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Character
    Returns the minimum number of players required for this character.
    getPlayers() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.EventContext
    Returns the players associated with this context.
    getPlayers() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Returns the list of registered players.
    getPoints() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Building
    Returns the points granted by the building.
    getPoints() - Method in class it.polimi.Buildings.Endgame_Effect
    Returns the base end-game points for this building.
    getPoints() - Method in class it.polimi.Characters.Builder
    Returns the prestige points granted by this Builder to the player's total.
    getPoints() - Method in class it.polimi.Events.Hunting
    Returns the prestige point reward multiplier per Hunter.
    getPoints() - Method in class it.polimi.Events.Sustenance
    Returns the prestige penalty applied when food is insufficient.
    getPortFromJSON() - Static method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.DbSettings
    Retrieves the database port from the configuration file.
    getPortFromJSON() - Static method in class it.polimi.Network.Config.NetworkSettings
    Retrieves the default port number from the JSON configuration.
    getPosition() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Card
    Returns the current board position of the card.
    getPpIfMet() - Method in class it.polimi.Events.RockPaintings
    Returns the prestige points gained per artist if the high threshold is met.
    getPpIfNotMet() - Method in class it.polimi.Events.RockPaintings
    Returns the prestige points lost if the low threshold is met.
    getPrestigePenalty() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.CardLoader.TurnOrderTrackRule
    Returns the penalty in prestige points.
    getPrestigePoints() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Character
    Returns the prestige points associated with this character.
    getPrestigePoints() - Method in class it.polimi.Characters.Builder
    Returns the prestige points generated by this Builder.
    getPrestigePoints() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Returns the player's current prestige points.
    getPreviewImage(String) - Static method in class it.polimi.Network.Client.ImageLoader
    Loads an image from the 'preview' folder in the project root or from resources.
    getProtocolFromJSON() - Static method in class it.polimi.Network.Config.NetworkSettings
    Retrieves the default transport protocol from the JSON configuration.
    getRequiredPlayers() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.GameRoom
    Gets the number of players requested for this match.
    getRitualData() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.RitualEventContext
    Returns the ritual data linked to this context.

    Retrieves the default RMI binding name from the JSON configuration.
    getRmiPortFromJSON() - Static method in class it.polimi.Network.Config.NetworkSettings
    Retrieves the default RMI registry port from the JSON configuration.

    Retrieves a GameRoom by its ID.

    Retrieves the GameRoom a specific player is currently in.

    Gets the unique ID of the room.

    Gets the room ID associated with this message.

    getRound() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Returns the current round number.

    Retrieves the socket read timeout in milliseconds from the configuration file.
    getStar() - Method in class it.polimi.Characters.Shaman
    Returns the star value contributed by this Shaman.
    getStar(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.Buildings.Ritual.RitualData
    Retrieves the current star count for a specific player.
    getTableFromJSON() - Static method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.DbSettings
    Retrieves the name of the database table for scores from the configuration file.
    getThresholdHigh() - Method in class it.polimi.Events.RockPaintings
    Returns the high artist threshold required to gain bonus points.
    getThresholdLow() - Method in class it.polimi.Events.RockPaintings
    Returns the low artist threshold below which players suffer a penalty.
    getTileImage(String) - Static method in class it.polimi.Network.Client.ImageLoader
    Gets an image from the tiles folder.

    Gets a front token image from mesos-cards/tokens.
    getTokenImage(String) - Static method in class it.polimi.Network.Client.ImageLoader
    Gets a regular token image from mesos-cards/tokens.
    getTribeDeck() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Returns the remaining tribe deck.

    Returns the specific character type.

    Returns the type of the event.

    Gets the type of the action.

    Gets the type of the update.

    Returns the buildings currently visible in the upper row.

    Returns the cards currently visible in the upper row.

    Retrieves the database username from the configuration file.
